title: Madonna Surprises Fans at Coachella with Sabrina Carpenter
summary: Madonna surprised everyone at the Coachella music festival by joining Sabrina Carpenter on stage. They sang songs together, including Vogue and Like A Prayer, and a new song from Madonna's album. Madonna talked about how she performed at Coachella 20 years ago, making it a special moment for her. She joked that Sabrina is shorter than her, which was funny. Coachella is a big festival in California where many famous singers perform. This surprise made fans very happy and excited to see two pop stars together.

background_read: Coachella is a famous music festival that happens every year in California. Many big singers and bands perform there for large crowds. Madonna is a very popular singer who has been making music for a long time. Sabrina Carpenter is a younger singer who is also famous. When singers surprise fans by appearing together, it makes the concert more fun and memorable.
Article_Structure: WHAT: They performed songs together at Coachella as a surprise
WHERE: At the Coachella music festival in California
WHY: To celebrate Madonna's return to Coachella after 20 years and entertain fans

perspectives.description: Fans were thrilled to see two pop stars collaborate unexpectedly.
